title: Implement final insights generation and compilation
description: After all chunks are transcribed, combine them sequentially, send the full transcript to Gemini to extract summary, decisions, action items, and risks, and update the meeting status to completed.
acceptanceCriteria: Waits until all chunks have been successfully transcribed.
Concatenates transcripts into a single full transcript.
Calls Gemini model with full transcript to extract structured summary, decisions, action items, and risks.
Updates `public.meetings` status to `'completed'` and writes transcript/summary once inserts succeed.

steps.description: Trigger insights generation on chunk completion
steps.details: Check if all chunks are processed in the API route. Gather all chunks from `transcript_chunks` ordered by `chunk_index`.
Pass the combined text to `gemini.models.generateContent` with a structured schema to extract summary, decisions, action items, and risks.

steps.description: Update meeting status and insert lists
steps.details: Bulk insert the decisions, action items, and risks. Set the main meeting record `status` to `'completed'` and write the full transcript.

technicalNotes: Run inserts and status update in a transaction or sequential steps, catching errors to set the meeting status to `'failed'` if anything fails.
